mapper.select: SELECT FOLDER_ID, FOLDER_NM, PARENT_FOLDER_ID, PATH_DEPTH FROM DAM_FOLDER ORDER BY PATH_DEPTH, FOLDER_ID

SELECT ASSET_ID, FILE_NM, FOLDER_ID, FILE_TYPE, FILE_EXT, FILE_SIZE, STATUS, TAGS, DESCRIPTION, RESOLUTION, DATE_FORMAT(UPLOAD_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS UPLOAD_DT FROM DAM_ASSET WHERE FOLDER_ID = #{folderId} ORDER BY ASSET_ID DESC

SELECT ASSET_ID, FILE_NM, FOLDER_ID, FILE_TYPE, FILE_EXT, FILE_SIZE, STATUS, TAGS, DESCRIPTION, RESOLUTION, DATE_FORMAT(UPLOAD_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS UPLOAD_DT FROM DAM_ASSET WHERE ASSET_ID = #{assetId}

SELECT V.VER_ID, V.ASSET_ID, V.VER_NO, A.FILE_NM, V.PREVIEW_URL, V.CHANGE_LOG, DATE_FORMAT(V.UPLOAD_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS UPLOAD_DT FROM DAM_VERSION V JOIN DAM_ASSET A ON A.ASSET_ID = V.ASSET_ID WHERE V.ASSET_ID = #{assetId} ORDER BY V.VER_ID DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT LOG_ID, ASSET_ID, USER_NM, ACTION_TP, DATE_FORMAT(ACTION_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS ACTION_DT, REMARK FROM DAM_ACCESS_LOG WHERE ASSET_ID = #{assetId} ORDER BY LOG_ID DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE DAM_ASSET SET FILE_NM = #{vo.fileNm}, FILE_TYPE = #{vo.fileType}, FILE_SIZE = #{vo.fileSize}, TAGS = #{vo.tags}, DESCRIPTION = #{vo.description}, STATUS = #{vo.status} WHERE ASSET_ID = #{vo.assetId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO DAM_VERSION ( ASSET_ID, VER_NO, FILE_URL, CHANGE_LOG, UPLOAD_DT ) VALUES ( #{vo.assetId}, #{vo.verNo}, COALESCE(NULLIF(#{vo.previewUrl}, ''), (SELECT V2.PREVIEW_URL FROM DAM_VERSION V2 WHERE V2.ASSET_ID = #{vo.assetId} ORDER BY V2.VER_ID DESC LIMIT 1), ''), #{vo.changeLog}, NOW() )
